prompt_text: Linear vs Asana pricing and features
response:
# Linear vs Asana: Pricing & Features Comparison

## **Pricing**

| Plan | Linear | Asana |
|------|--------|-------|
| **Free** | Yes ($0) | Yes ($0) |
| **Pro/Standard** | $10/user/month | $10.99/user/month |
| **Plus/Premium** | $30/user/month | $24.99/user/month |
| **Enterprise** | Custom | Custom |

**Key difference**: Linear charges per active member; Asana offers more tiered options.

---

## **Core Features Comparison**

### **Linear Strengths**
✅ Purpose-built for **software development teams**  
✅ **Fast, snappy interface** (optimized performance)  
✅ **GitHub/GitLab integration** (seamless CI/CD)  
✅ Keyboard shortcuts & power-user features  
✅ **Cycles** (sprint-like planning)  
✅ Excellent for **technical teams**  
✅ Simpler learning curve for devs

### **Asana Strengths**
✅ **Broader team appeal** (non-technical + technical)  
✅ Multiple **view types** (timeline, calendar, list, board, table)  
✅ **More automation & workflows**  
✅ Advanced **reporting & dashboards**  
✅ Better for **cross-functional projects**  
✅ Strong **portfolio management**  
✅ Mobile app is more polished

---

## **Best For**

| Use Case | Choose |
|----------|--------|
| Software development teams | **Linear** |
| Small, fast-moving startups | **Linear** |
| Marketing/creative teams | **Asana** |
| Enterprise/large orgs | **Asana** |
| Multi-team coordination | **Asana** |
| GitHub-heavy workflows | **Linear** |

---

## **Verdict**

- **Linear**: Best for engineering teams who want speed & dev-focused features
- **Asana**: Best for diverse teams needing flexibility & broader functionality

Would you like deeper details on any specific feature?
